title: Solar Capability Token
description: A scoped, time-limited capability grant issued at task dispatch time. Controls what a specific actor may do during a specific task. Tokens must be narrow by default: secret paths, git push, destructive shell actions, and unrestricted network require explicit grants.

task_id.description: The DAG node task_id this token is scoped to.

sprint_id.description: Sprint this token was issued for.

issued_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the token was issued.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the token expires. Required — tokens must have a finite lifetime.

file_scope.description: File read/write permissions for this token.

secrets.description: Access to secrets. Denied by default.

failure_fingerprint.description: Known failure patterns for this actor/task combination.

revoked.description: If true, this token has been revoked and must not be honored.

write_paths.description: Allowed write path prefixes. Empty means no writes allowed.

read_only_paths.description: Additional read-only path prefixes beyond write_paths.

secret_paths_allowed.description: Whether access to secret/credential paths is allowed. MUST be false by default.

destructive_allowed.description: Whether destructive file operations (rm, truncate, overwrite) are permitted. MUST be false by default.

allowed.description: Whether shell command execution is permitted at all.

destructive_commands_allowed.description: Whether destructive commands (rm -rf, kill, format, drop) are permitted. MUST be false by default.

allowed_commands.description: Explicit allowlist of command names/prefixes. Empty = all allowed (when allowed=true).

denied_commands.description: Explicit denylist of command names/prefixes. Takes precedence over allowed_commands.

allowed.description: Whether any network access is permitted.

unrestricted.description: Whether unrestricted external network access is permitted. MUST be false by default — unrestricted network is a broad grant.

allowed_hosts.description: Explicit allowlist of hostnames/CIDRs. Empty = internal only (when allowed=true, unrestricted=false).

push_allowed.description: Whether git push is permitted. MUST be false by default — push has external side effects.

force_push_allowed.description: Whether git push --force is permitted. MUST be false by default.

allowed_remotes.description: Allowed remote names for push operations. Empty = push denied regardless of push_allowed.

secrets_scope.description: Secrets access scope. Denied by default.

allowed.description: Whether secrets access is permitted at all. MUST be false by default.

allowed_secret_refs.description: Explicit allowlist of secret references (names/paths). Empty = no secrets (when allowed=true).

failure_fingerprint.description: Known failure patterns for diagnostic routing. Populated from historical execution data.

common_failures.description: Ordered list of known failure patterns for this actor/task combination.

label.description: Canonical failure label for routing and alerting.

pattern.description: Regex or substring pattern that identifies this failure in error messages/logs.

frequency.description: How often this failure occurs for this actor/task type.

last_failure_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last known failure.

failure_count.description: Total failure count for this actor/task combination.
